description_long: This is a countertop stand mixer, predominantly white with a metallic mixing bowl attached to its base. The mixer features a robust, enclosed body with a rounded top and a prominent mixing head, which houses the motor and mixing mechanism. A large stainless steel bowl is secured to the base, with a wire whisk attachment visible inside. The power cord is wrapped around the back of the chassis, and a control panel with a speed dial and safety label is present on the rear. The mixer sits on a flat, sturdy base, likely designed to prevent slipping during operation. The overall design is functional and classic, suitable for heavy-duty mixing tasks in kitchens or food preparation areas.
description: A white countertop stand mixer with a metallic mixing bowl and a classic, robust design. Features a rounded top, visible whisk attachment, and a wrapped power cord.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white mixer body, metallic bowl, and whisk attachment, with the power cord partially visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wrapped power cord, safety label, and the back of the mixer head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mixer body, bowl, and attachment, with the control knob and bowl handle more visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the metallic bowl, whisk attachment, and the front of the mixer head with the 'KitchenAid' branding.
attribute_brand_logo: KitchenAid logo is visible on the front of the mixer head.
attribute_control_panel_type: Analog dial with printed speed settings and a safety label on the rear.
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with a rounded top and sturdy base
